understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by positioning every selectable piece (P or S) onto distinct goal tiles (+) simultaneously in each level's grid to trigger a WIN condition and advance.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece (P) in a direction by 3 pixels per cell, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if space allows; walls (#) block movement variably depending on their type; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at exact pixel coordinates like [x, y], allowing control of multiple pieces; all goals must be covered at once for victory, with hints like movement.blocked aiding but not guaranteeing outcomes.
